represents the final validated shape of your form data. It defines the full object structure that the form is expected to produce after successful validation and submission.
is the central state manager of your form — a single, type-safe source of truth that orchestrates data, fields, validation, and submission lifecycle.
It holds and mutates form data immutably (powered by
), tracks field registration dynamically, manages dirty/touched state, and coordinates schema-based validation via

.
Through its event system, it emits fine-grained updates for value changes, validation, submission status, and field lifecycle events — making it framework-agnostic and highly reactive.
is the core engine that keeps your form

FormController API Documentation — Type-Safe Reactive Form State & Validation Engine

Comprehensive documentation for FormController — a fully type-safe, schema-driven form state manager with field registration, reactive events, immutable data handling, and granular validation. Learn how to manage complex nested forms with predictable submission, validation, and lifecycle control.
